description_long: This is a suburban residential property featuring two main house structures surrounded by a neatly trimmed hedge and a paved driveway. The larger house has a hip roof and multiple windows, while the smaller building appears to be a detached garage or guest house. The property includes a circular driveway, a small round pool or fountain, and several mature trees providing shade and privacy. There are also bushes lining the front and side boundaries, and a small shed or outbuilding in one corner. The overall layout is spacious, with open paved areas and landscaped greenery, typical of a well-maintained family home.
description: A spacious suburban property with two main house structures, a circular driveway, landscaped greenery, and several mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two house structures, circular driveway, and a row of trees and bushes along the left side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the main house, detached garage, pool or fountain, and a shed in the far corner.
description_view_2: Side view with a clear look at the main house's windows, driveway, and a cluster of trees on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the property, the shed, and the arrangement of trees and bushes.
attribute_entryway_design: Central main door with a small porch, steps, and flanking columns, leading to a paved walkway.
